title: vernonia celebica
intro: Vernonia celebica, also known as False Plectranthus, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In traditional medicine, Vernonia celebica is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to make a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
